productDisplayName: Spykar Men Navy Blue Trevor Brief
description: Composition Navy blue brief made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex fabric, has the signature logo on the contrast waistband, shaped-to-Fit contoured pouch and printed label on the inner Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cold iron if needed Revel in the comfort of soft cotton with this navy blue, low-rise tanga cut bikini brief from spykar. Crafted from a quick dry fabric, the tanga cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the printed label offers abrasion-free comfort.
